mapper.sql:
`groups`.*,
DATE_FORMAT(`groups`.created, '%d-%b-%y %h:%i') AS createdDate, DATE_FORMAT(`groups`.modified, '%d-%b-%y %h:%i') AS modifiedDate, CONCAT(users1.first_name, ' ', users1.last_name) AS createdBy, CONCAT(users2.first_name, ' ', users2.last_name) AS modifiedBy
FROM `groups` LEFT JOIN users AS users1 ON users1.id = `groups`.created_by LEFT JOIN users AS users2 ON users2.id = `groups`.modified_by
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users INNER JOIN user_groups ON user_groups.user_id = users.id WHERE users.is_active = 1 AND user_groups.group_id = #{id}

SELECT *, name AS nameOther FROM module_types WHERE status = 1 AND id IN ( SELECT (SELECT module_type_id FROM modules WHERE id = module_id) FROM permissions WHERE group_id IN (SELECT group_id FROM user_groups WHERE user_id = #{userId}) )

SELECT * FROM module_types_api WHERE status = 1 AND id IN ( SELECT (SELECT module_type_id FROM modules_api WHERE id = module_id AND type = 'VIEW') FROM permissions_api WHERE group_id IN (SELECT group_id FROM user_groups_api WHERE user_id = #{userId}) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `groups` ( sys_code, name, created, created_by, is_active ) VALUES ( MD5(NOW()), #{name}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update: UPDATE groups SET `name` = #{name}, `is_active` = #{isActive}, modified = NOW(), modified_by = #{modifiedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: DELETE FROM user_groups WHERE user_id = #{userId}; INSERT INTO user_groups (user_id, group_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId});
mapper.select: SELECT g.name FROM `groups` g INNER JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.group_id = g.id WHERE ug.user_id = #{userId} AND g.is_active = 1
